positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a mythical creature, possibly a stylized griffin or phoenix, soaring above a vibrant, abstracted cityscape at sunset. The design should feature clean, strong silhouettes and geometric patterns mixed with organic flow. Use a highly contrasted, limited color palette (e.g., deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and gold metallic highlights) suitable for screen printing on fabric. The composition must be centered, dynamic, and easily readable as an apparel graphic. Vector illustration style, high detail, clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic, symmetrical or highly balanced composition, inspired by Art Nouveau and modern geometry, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, words, logo, trademark, copyright, graffiti, messy, photographic, realistic photo, gradient wash
